title: Rivigo South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Rivigo South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled E-commerce Executive looking for your next big career move? Rivigo South Asia Partners in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
